case_title: NANCY MAGDALENA ROJAS JULCA VS. ZACHARY WADE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF NANCY MAGDALENA ROJAS JULCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZACHARY WADE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER DAVID BENJAMIN SHAFER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00<WAIVED>); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENT. SERVED FEB-15-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WADE, ZACHARY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY ROJAS JULCA, NANCY MAGDALENA AS TO DEFENDANT WADE, ZACHARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROJAS JULCA, NANCY MAGDALENA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROJAS JULCA, NANCY MAGDALENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WADE, ZACHARY $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
